response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems with strong software-craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and proven ability to ship production systems at scale (Sociomantic's millions of req/sec, Tencent's mail automation). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry systems, or statistical analysis — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Title progression suggests Senior/Staff level rather than Principal-level systemic platform leadership across multiple teams.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with 13+ years across Node/TS, C/C++, Java, D, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong software-craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops/talks
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at Naver aligns with AI-first engineering velocity
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or rollout-risk systems
Limited evidence of data/statistical analysis, metrics infrastructure, or experimental quality work
Career level reads as Senior/Staff IC; lacks Principal-scale cross-org platform leadership examples

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot fundamentals and scale experience
Insufficient evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team systemic impact
